title: Spatially resolved T cell receptor tracking reveals γδT cell localization to tumor-rich regions in high-risk neuroblastoma: A Report from the Children's Oncology Group.
publicationName: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
journalName: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
snippet: High-risk neuroblastoma (HRNB) is a leading cause of pediatric cancer death. Current therapies center on intensive multimodal treatment including anti-GD2 therapy, with growing interest in harnessing T cell-mediated immunity. How T cells and their receptors (T-cell receptors, TCRs) are spatially organized and function within tumors remains poorly defined. T...
